name: prompt-purity-prompts
description: Curated veer-prone subset referenced BY ID from ../test-sets/default.json. Hard, layout/data/theming-heavy tasks are where agents abandon the design system for raw CSS/Tailwind. expectedComponents is eval-only and is NEVER shown to the agent (Checker Protocol §3). Referenced by id to avoid answer-leak and drift.
selectionStrategy: hardest, most veer-prone tasks across distinct categories; K>=5 reps per prompt per condition since veering is stochastic.
notes: tc-6 explicitly asks for the XDS theme system 'not inline styles' — a direct veer probe.
dd-1/dd-5 (tables) and wd-4 (a full internal tool) strongly tempt hand-rolled markup + CSS.
IDs verified against ../test-sets/default.json. Do NOT copy prompt text or expectedComponents here.
